title: German Genius.
content:
Strive, O German, for Roman-like strength and for Grecian-like beauty!
    Thou art successful in both; ne'er has the Gaul had success.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Friedrich Schiller delivers a powerful performance in "German Genius."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
